Why This Works

Built on Real Science.
Proven by Real Results.

We don't just bring people together; we wrap our community in a web of experts, tools, and technology to ensure each member gets tremendous value.

settings_suggest

Personalized Protocols

expand_more

Adaptive algorithms tailored to individual neuro-profiles.

Our AI-driven system analyzes over 40 cognitive markers to create a brain health journey unique to each member. From sleep optimization to focus training, every protocol adapts in real-time based on progress data and biofeedback integration.

menu_book

Expert-Led Resource Library

expand_more

Over 500+ hours of video content updated weekly.

Access clinical guides, video masterclasses, printable worksheets, and interactive exercises from board-certified neurologists, psychiatrists, and cognitive therapists. New content drops every Tuesday, ensuring your referrals always have fresh reasons to stay engaged.

groups

Vibrant Peer Community

expand_more

Moderated spaces for support and accountability.

Members join curated cohorts based on their brain health focus. Moderated forums, weekly live Q&As with experts, and accountability partnerships create the kind of engagement that keeps retention rates above 98% — meaning your recurring commissions keep flowing.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked

What commission structure do you offer?

expand_more

You earn $3.97 per month for every member you refer, for as long as they remain subscribed — that's $47.64 in annualized value per conversion. Membership is $9.97/month, and your affiliate rate is locked in from day one. Payouts are processed monthly via direct deposit with no minimum threshold.

Do I need a large following to apply?

expand_more

Not at all. We value engagement quality over raw numbers. Affiliates with as few as 1,000 highly-engaged followers in the brain health, parenting, or wellness space often outperform larger accounts. We look for authentic alignment over audience size.

What marketing support do you provide?

expand_more

Every affiliate receives our complete 2026 Marketing Toolkit: pre-written email sequences, social media templates, HD video assets, branded landing pages, and a dedicated partner success manager. We also host monthly strategy calls and provide A/B-tested creative assets.

How do I track my referrals and earnings?

expand_more

Through our real-time partner dashboard — powered by Rootabl — you can see clicks, conversions, active subscriptions, and projected earnings. You'll receive instant notifications for every conversion and weekly performance summaries straight to your inbox.
